description: Create new app configuration for a specified project

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

manifest_url.description: Presigned Temporary Url For Manifest Configuration

projects.description: List of project ids the app configuration applies to

applies_to_all_projects.description: Apply the app configuration to all projects under a company ( if set to true, project_ids field must be blank )

applies_to_company.description: Apply the app configuration to be available from company routes

instance_configuration.description: App configuration values for a set of projects.

project_ids.description: A list of projects which will have the app configuration
